An '''Aqualish bounty hunter''' was present within the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]] when [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]] learned that [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] had [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|murdered]] Zorba's [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|son]]. Along with an [[Unidentified Twi'lek bounty hunter (Tatooine)|unidentified Twi'lek]], he ambushed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], however, he was in turn [[Death/Legends|killed]], along with his [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] companion during the attempt.

==Appearances==
*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
